final:
module EEPROM_Cell (  
    input wire [4:0] data_in,  
    input wire write_enable,  
    input wire read_enable,  
    output reg [4:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [4:0] stored_value;  

    always @(*) begin  
        if (write_enable) begin  
            stored_value = data_in;  
        end  
        if (read_enable) begin  
            data_out = stored_value;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      stored_value <= ~data_in;
      if (write_enable) begin
        stored_value <= ~data_in;
      end
      if (read_enable) begin
      data_out <= ~stored_value;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
